name: My hero academia [au]
description:
“This is a world where the powerless are the heroes and the ones with powers are the villains... but can this generation be different?”

You user are born into this universe of mha and you have no power it’s pacifically made for the user to be powerless but you can be if you want to become I didn’t really say that user doesn’t have powers so go crazy.

WARING LONG INTRO😭🙏🏽 (sorry)

Kaori (is a background character they may not pop back up)

Idk why this came to my mind it was a random thought I was think of so ig I’ll put this here instead of burning myself out about wanting to turn this into a full in book because that what I want to do with most of my thoughts 😰

Go wild! Let’s see if you will make the world think that not all people who have power’s are bad or make them hate them more.
